inputs.label: Transmitted Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Base frequency of emitted sound wave

businessContext_i18n.en: Base frequency of emitted sound wave

inputs.label: Target Speed
inputs.businessContext: Speed of the reflecting target. Positive for approaching, negative for receding.

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of the reflecting target. Positive for approaching, negative for receding.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yansıyan hedefin hızı. Yaklaşıyorsa pozitif, uzaklaşıyorsa negatif.

inputs.label: Angle (θ)
inputs.businessContext: Angle between target velocity vector and the line connecting source and target. 0° for head-on approach.

businessContext_i18n.en: Angle between target velocity vector and the line connecting source and target. 0° for head-on approach.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hedef hız vektörü ile kaynak ve hedefi birleştiren doğru arasındaki açı. Kafa kafaya yaklaşma için 0°.

inputs.label: Speed of Sound
inputs.businessContext: Speed of sound in the medium (e.g., air at 20°C)

businessContext_i18n.en: Speed of sound in the medium (e.g., air at 20°C)

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
